daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await!

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | NROL-172
top_events.description: A SpaceX Falcon 9 Block 5 rocket is set to launch the NROL-172 mission for the National Reconnaissance Office.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for a glimpse of this important reconnaissance mission.

top_events.title: Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34
top_events.description: SpaceX's Dragon CRS-2 mission will deliver supplies to the International Space Station.
top_events.action: Follow the mission updates and watch the live stream.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A moderate aurora is predicted with a Kp index of 4.33, visible at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check the skies if you're in northern latitudes above 65°.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
